description: Multi-skill operation: create job AND allocate equipment
prompt: Set up job 245-0012 for Acme Corp and allocate drills CRL0101 and CRL0102 to it

expected.job: create or update job: job_id=245-0012, client_name=Acme Corp
expected.equipment: update equipment CRL0101 and CRL0102: job_id=245-0012, status=Allocated
